title: Semi Truck Transporter Trailer Race Car Auto Hauler Carrier Play Set - Blue
description:
Loading, unloading and hauling the 6 classic die-cast race cars within this transport truck gets imaginations moving. Playing with toy trucks and race cars as a kid is a must! No childhood is complete without a collection of toy vehicles! The Auto Hauler 6 Car Truck Carrier is brightly detailed with super speed racing flames on the side of the cab. From the side you can see all the awesome fiery of the race cars that are contained in each of their respectable slots. Additionally, the semi truck's car carrier comes with a hidden handle, so kids will be able to cart around their favorite cars to and from play dates

Semi Truck Transporter Trailer Race Car Auto Hauler Carrier Play Set - Blue

Loading, unloading and hauling the 6 classic die-cast race cars within this transport truck gets imaginations moving. Playing with toy trucks and race cars as a kid is a must! No childhood is complete without a collection of toy vehicles!

Key Features

  • Fun Race-themed Design
  • Transporter Truck with Diecast Colored Race Cars
  • (6) Diecast Race Cars in Assorted Colors that load and Unload
  • Hidden Top Handle for Easy Transportation
  • Hot Flames Decal on Truck

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 982467
  • UPC: 885189654837
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: Large

The Auto Hauler 6 Car Truck Carrier is brightly detailed with super speed racing flames on the side of the cab. From the side you can see all the awesome fiery of the race cars that are contained in each of their respectable slots. Additionally, the semi truck's car carrier comes with a hidden handle, so kids will be able to cart around their favorite cars to and from play dates. The carry case opens to reveal individual spaces for each race car!

Every kid needs their share of toy cars and trucks! The multiple colors of race cars and sleek appearance of the truck and carrier will provide children with hours of pretend racing and driving fun.

Easy and simple to travel with & to take along with you wherever you may go!
